_meta.purpose: Bulk x3 batch 2: Mobility, Yoga, Breath/Relax (40 exercises)

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
instructions: Start on hands and knees with wrists under shoulders and knees under hips.
Inhale and arch the spine dropping the belly while looking up (cow).
Exhale and round the spine tucking the chin and pelvis (cat); alternate slowly.

exercises.name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: From a push-up position step the right foot outside the right hand into a deep lunge.
Drop the right elbow toward the instep, then rotate the torso opening the right arm up to the ceiling.
Return the hand to the floor and step back; alternate sides.

exercises.name: Thoracic Bridge
instructions: Sit with knees bent, feet flat and hands behind you, fingers pointing back.
Lift the hips and rotate to one side reaching the free hand overhead in a thoracic extension.
Return to the start under control; alternate sides.

exercises.name: Open Book Thoracic Rotation
instructions: Lie on one side with knees stacked at 90° and arms extended in front, palms together.
Inhale and slowly open the top arm across the body following it with your gaze, keeping the knees stacked.
Exhale to return; complete reps and switch sides.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Switch
instructions: Sit with one shin in front parallel to the body and the other shin to the side, both at 90°.
Lift the knees and rotate the hips to switch leg positions to the opposite side.
Return slowly under control without using the hands.

exercises.name: Ankle Rocking
instructions: Kneel on one knee with the front foot flat and hands on the front thigh.
Drive the front knee forward over the toes feeling a stretch in the ankle, keeping the heel down.
Return and repeat for reps; switch sides.

exercises.name: Wrist Warm-up Circles
instructions: Extend the arms in front and interlock the fingers.
Circle the wrists slowly clockwise for the prescribed reps.
Reverse direction for the same number of reps.

exercises.name: Neck CARs
instructions: Sit or stand tall with shoulders relaxed.
Slowly rotate the head in a controlled circle exploring the full range without pain.
Reverse direction for the same reps; keep the motion slow.

exercises.name: Shoulder CARs
instructions: Stand tall with one arm at the side, brace the core.
Trace the largest controlled circle possible with the arm: forward, up, back and down.
Reverse direction; switch arms.

exercises.name: Hip CARs
instructions: Stand on one leg, holding a wall for balance if needed.
Lift the free knee to hip height, abduct it to the side, then rotate it back behind you and lower.
Reverse the circle; switch sides.

exercises.name: Foam Roll Thoracic Spine
instructions: Lie back on a foam roller placed across the upper back, knees bent and hands behind the head.
Lift the hips slightly and roll up and down between the shoulder blades and mid-back.
Pause on tight spots and breathe slowly; avoid the lumbar spine.

exercises.name: Foam Roll Quads
instructions: Lie face-down with the foam roller across the front of the thighs, supporting the upper body on the forearms.
Roll slowly from above the knees to the hip flexors.
Pause on tight spots and breathe; avoid rolling directly on the kneecap.

exercises.name: Foam Roll Glutes
instructions: Sit on a foam roller with one ankle crossed over the opposite knee.
Lean toward the crossed-leg side and roll slowly across the glute.
Pause on tight spots and breathe; switch sides.

exercises.name: Pec Release with Massage Ball
instructions: Place a massage ball between the upper chest and a wall just below the collarbone.
Lean into the ball and slowly explore the area moving the arm to find tight spots.
Hold each tight spot for 20–30 seconds breathing slowly; switch sides.

exercises.name: Couch Stretch
instructions: Kneel facing away from a wall or couch, place one shin against the wall with the foot pointing up and the other foot flat in front in a lunge.
Squeeze the back glute and lift the chest tall, keeping the lower back neutral.
Hold for 30–60 seconds breathing slowly; switch sides.

exercises.name: Downward-Facing Dog
instructions: From hands and knees, tuck the toes and lift the hips up and back into an inverted V shape.
Press the chest toward the thighs and the heels toward the floor without locking the knees.
Hold breathing steadily for the prescribed time.

exercises.name: Upward-Facing Dog

restrictions.note: Reduce arch depth or substitute with cobra pose.

instructions: Lie face-down with hands under the shoulders and tops of the feet on the mat.
Press into the hands lifting the chest, hips and thighs off the floor with arms straight.
Roll the shoulders back and look slightly up; hold breathing steadily.

exercises.name: Cobra Pose

restrictions.note: Stay in a low cobra (sphinx) variation while symptoms persist.

instructions: Lie face-down with hands under the shoulders and elbows tucked.
Press lightly into the hands lifting the chest off the floor with the elbows still bent.
Hold breathing steadily; lower under control.

exercises.name: Child's Pose
instructions: Kneel on the mat with big toes touching and knees apart.
Sit the hips back to the heels and walk the hands forward extending the arms.
Rest the forehead on the mat and breathe slowly into the back.

exercises.name: Warrior I
instructions: Step one foot forward into a long lunge with the back foot turned out 45°.
Bend the front knee over the ankle and reach both arms overhead, palms facing.
Square the hips forward and hold breathing steadily; switch sides.

exercises.name: Warrior II
instructions: Step the feet wide apart, turn the front foot forward and the back foot 90° to the side.
Bend the front knee over the ankle and extend the arms parallel to the floor.
Gaze over the front hand and hold breathing steadily; switch sides.

exercises.name: Triangle Pose
instructions: Step the feet wide, turn the front foot forward and back foot 90°, arms extended sideways.
Hinge from the front hip reaching the front hand toward the ankle and the top hand to the ceiling.
Keep the chest open and gaze up; switch sides.

exercises.name: Tree Pose
instructions: Stand tall and shift weight onto one foot.
Place the other foot on the inner ankle, calf or thigh (avoid the knee) and bring the hands to the chest or overhead.
Hold breathing steadily; switch sides.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
instructions: From hands and knees, bring one shin forward across the mat with the back leg extended straight back.
Square the hips and lower the torso over the front shin to your comfortable depth.
Hold breathing slowly; switch sides.

exercises.name: Seated Forward Fold
instructions: Sit with both legs extended forward and feet flexed.
Hinge from the hips reaching toward the feet without rounding the lower back.
Hold breathing steadily; bend the knees slightly if needed.

exercises.name: Bridge Pose (Setu Bandha)
instructions: Lie on the back with knees bent and feet hip-width apart.
Press into the feet and lift the hips toward the ceiling, optionally clasping the hands beneath the body.
Hold breathing steadily and lower under control.

exercises.name: Happy Baby
instructions: Lie on the back and bring the knees toward the armpits.
Grab the outsides of the feet and gently pull them down toward the floor with shins vertical.
Rock slightly side to side breathing slowly.

exercises.name: Sun Salutation A
instructions: From standing inhale arms overhead, exhale fold forward, inhale halfway lift.
Exhale step or jump back to plank, lower to the floor, inhale to upward dog, exhale to downward dog and breathe.
Step or jump to the front of the mat, inhale halfway lift, exhale fold, inhale to stand; complete reps.

exercises.name: Sun Salutation B
instructions: From standing inhale into chair pose, exhale fold forward, inhale halfway lift, exhale step back to plank then chaturanga, inhale upward dog, exhale downward dog.
Inhale step the right foot forward into Warrior I, exhale return to plank/chaturanga and flow through up dog and down dog; repeat with left.
Step or jump to the front, inhale halfway lift, exhale fold, inhale to chair, exhale stand; complete reps.

exercises.name: Supine Spinal Twist
instructions: Lie on the back, hug one knee to the chest then guide it across the body to the opposite side.
Extend the same-side arm out and turn the gaze toward the extended arm, keeping both shoulders on the floor.
Hold breathing slowly; switch sides.

exercises.name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
instructions: Lie on the back with knees bent and one hand on the chest, the other on the belly.
Inhale slowly through the nose for 4 seconds expanding the belly while the chest stays relatively still.
Exhale through pursed lips for 6 seconds; repeat for the prescribed time.

exercises.name: Box Breathing 4-4-4-4
instructions: Sit comfortably with the spine tall and shoulders relaxed.
Inhale through the nose for 4 seconds, hold for 4 seconds.
Exhale for 4 seconds, hold empty for 4 seconds; repeat the cycle.

exercises.name: Coherent Breathing
instructions: Sit or lie comfortably with the spine in neutral.
Inhale through the nose for 5 seconds expanding the belly and ribs.
Exhale through the nose for 5 seconds; continue at this pace for 5–10 minutes.

exercises.name: Alternate Nostril Breathing (Nadi Shodhana)
instructions: Sit comfortably and bring the right hand to the face with thumb on the right nostril and ring finger on the left.
Close the right nostril and inhale through the left, then close the left and exhale through the right.
Inhale through the right, close it and exhale through the left; continue alternating.

exercises.name: 4-7-8 Breathing
instructions: Sit comfortably and place the tongue tip behind the upper teeth.
Inhale silently through the nose for 4 seconds, hold the breath for 7 seconds.
Exhale audibly through the mouth for 8 seconds; repeat for 4 cycles.

exercises.name: Savasana
instructions: Lie on the back with arms slightly away from the body, palms up, and feet relaxed apart.
Close the eyes and let the body sink into the mat releasing all muscular effort.
Breathe naturally for 5–15 minutes.

exercises.name: Legs-Up-the-Wall

restrictions.note: Keep the head slightly elevated and limit duration to a few minutes.

instructions: Sit sideways against a wall and swing the legs up the wall as you lie back on the mat.
Slide the hips close to the wall and let the arms relax at the sides.
Breathe slowly for 5–15 minutes.

exercises.name: Supported Fish Pose
instructions: Place a foam roller along the spine and lie back so it supports the upper back lengthwise.
Let the arms fall open to the sides and the legs extend or bend at the knees.
Breathe slowly opening the chest for 2–5 minutes.

exercises.name: Body Scan Relaxation
instructions: Lie comfortably on the back with arms by the sides and eyes closed.
Bring attention slowly through each body part from feet to head, noticing sensations without judgement.
Breathe naturally for 10–20 minutes.

exercises.name: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
instructions: Lie on the back and tense the feet for 5 seconds, then fully release for 10 seconds.
Move up the body tensing and releasing calves, thighs, glutes, abdomen, hands, arms, shoulders and face.
Finish with 1–2 minutes of natural breathing.

cat_cow_v1.name: Gat-vaca
instructions: Comença a quatre grapes amb canells sota espatlles i genolls sota malucs.
Inspira i arqueja la columna baixant la panxa mentre mires amunt (vaca).
Espira i arrodoneix la columna amagant la barbeta i la pelvis (gat); alterna lentament.

world_greatest_stretch_v1.name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: Des de posició de flexió, avança el peu dret per fora de la mà dreta en una llunja profunda.
Baixa el colze dret cap al peu i després rota el tronc obrint el braç dret cap al sostre.
Torna la mà al terra i recula; alterna costats.

thoracic_bridge_v1.name: Pont toràcic
instructions: Asseu-te amb genolls flexionats, peus al terra i mans darrere amb dits cap enrere.
Aixeca els malucs i rota cap a un costat estenent el braç lliure cap amunt en extensió toràcica.
Torna a la posició inicial controlat; alterna costats.

open_book_stretch_v1.name: Open book toràcic
instructions: Estira't de costat amb genolls superposats a 90° i braços estesos endavant, palmells junts.
Inspira i obre lentament el braç de dalt seguint-lo amb la mirada, mantenint els genolls junts.
Espira per tornar; fes reps i canvia de costat.

hip_90_90_switch_v1.name: Switch de maluc 90/90
instructions: Asseu-te amb una cama davant amb la tíbia paral·lela al cos i l'altra al costat, totes dues a 90°.
Aixeca els genolls i rota els malucs per canviar les cames a la posició oposada.
Torna lentament controlat sense ajudar-te amb les mans.

ankle_rocking_v1.name: Mobilitat de turmell
instructions: Agenolla't sobre un genoll amb el peu davant pla i mans sobre la cuixa.
Empeny el genoll davanter cap endavant per damunt dels dits sentint estirament al turmell, amb el taló a terra.
Torna i repeteix; canvia de costat.

wrist_warmup_circles_v1.name: Cercles d'escalfament de canells
instructions: Estén els braços endavant i entrellaça els dits.
Fes cercles lents amb els canells en sentit horari per les reps prescrites.
Inverteix la direcció el mateix nombre de reps.

neck_cars_v1.name: CARs de coll
instructions: Asseu-te o queda't dret amb les espatlles relaxades.
Rota lentament el cap fent un cercle controlat explorant el rang sense dolor.
Inverteix la direcció les mateixes reps; mantingues el moviment lent.

shoulder_cars_v1.name: CARs d'espatlla
instructions: Dret amb un braç al costat, contrau el core.
Traça el cercle controlat més gran possible amb el braç: endavant, amunt, enrere i avall.
Inverteix la direcció; canvia de braç.

hip_cars_v1.name: CARs de maluc
instructions: Dret sobre una cama, agafa't a una paret per equilibri si cal.
Aixeca el genoll lliure a l'altura del maluc, obre'l cap al costat i després porta'l darrere i baixa'l.
Inverteix el cercle; canvia de costat.

foam_roll_thoracic_v1.name: Foam roller dorsal
instructions: Estira't sobre un foam roller col·locat a la part alta de l'esquena, genolls flexionats i mans darrere del cap.
Aixeca lleugerament els malucs i mou-te amunt i avall entre les escàpules i la zona mitja.
Pausa als punts tensos i respira lent; evita la zona lumbar.

foam_roll_quads_v1.name: Foam roller quàdriceps
instructions: Estira't boca avall amb el foam roller a la part frontal de les cuixes, sostingut sobre els avantbraços.
Mou-te lentament des de just sobre els genolls fins als flexors del maluc.
Pausa als punts tensos i respira; evita rodar sobre la ròtula.

foam_roll_glutes_v1.name: Foam roller glutis
instructions: Asseu-te sobre un foam roller amb un turmell creuat sobre el genoll oposat.
Inclina't cap al costat de la cama creuada i mou-te lentament sobre el glúti.
Pausa als punts tensos i respira; canvia de costat.

pec_release_ball_v1.name: Alliberament pectoral amb pilota
instructions: Posa una pilota de massatge entre la part alta del pit i una paret, just sota la clavícula.
Aplica pressió contra la pilota i mou el braç per trobar punts tensos.
Mantingues 20–30 segons cada punt respirant lent; canvia de costat.

couch_stretch_v1.name: Couch stretch
instructions: Agenolla't d'esquena a la paret o sofà, posa una tíbia contra la paret amb el peu cap amunt i l'altre peu pla davant en llunja.
Contrau el glúti del darrere i puja el pit alt mantenint la lumbar neutra.
Mantingues 30–60 segons respirant lent; canvia de costat.

downward_dog_v1.name: Gos cap avall
instructions: Des de quatre grapes, plega els dits dels peus i puja els malucs amunt i enrere fent una V invertida.
Pressiona el pit cap a les cuixes i els talons cap al terra sense bloquejar genolls.
Mantingues respirant amb constància pel temps prescrit.

upward_dog_v1.name: Gos cap amunt
instructions: Estira't boca avall amb mans sota espatlles i empenyes dels peus al matalàs.
Empeny les mans aixecant el pit, malucs i cuixes del terra amb braços estesos.
Roda les espatlles enrere i mira lleugerament amunt; mantingues respirant.

cobra_pose_v1.name: Postura de la cobra
instructions: Estira't boca avall amb les mans sota les espatlles i els colzes plegats.
Empeny lleugerament aixecant el pit del terra amb els colzes encara plegats.
Mantingues respirant; baixa controlat.

childs_pose_v1.name: Postura del nen
instructions: Agenolla't al matalàs amb els polzes dels peus tocant-se i els genolls oberts.
Asseu els malucs als talons i camina les mans endavant estenent els braços.
Recolza el front al matalàs i respira lent cap a l'esquena.

warrior_one_v1.name: Guerrer I
instructions: Avança un peu en una llunja llarga amb el peu del darrere girat 45°.
Flexiona el genoll davanter sobre el turmell i estén els dos braços amunt, palmells encarats.
Quadra els malucs endavant i mantingues respirant; canvia de costat.

warrior_two_v1.name: Guerrer II
instructions: Obre els peus, gira el peu davanter endavant i el del darrere 90° al costat.
Flexiona el genoll davanter sobre el turmell i estén els braços paral·lels al terra.
Mira sobre la mà davantera i mantingues respirant; canvia de costat.

triangle_pose_v1.name: Postura del triangle
instructions: Obre els peus, gira el peu davanter endavant i el del darrere 90°, braços estesos als costats.
Flexiona pel maluc davanter portant la mà davantera cap al turmell i la mà de dalt cap al sostre.
Mantingues el pit obert i mira amunt; canvia de costat.

tree_pose_v1.name: Postura de l'arbre
instructions: Dret i transfereix el pes a una cama.
Posa l'altre peu al turmell, bessó o cuixa interna (evita el genoll) i porta les mans al pit o amunt.
Mantingues respirant; canvia de costat.

pigeon_pose_v1.name: Postura del colom
instructions: Des de quatre grapes, porta una tíbia endavant creuant el matalàs amb la cama del darrere estirada.
Quadra els malucs i baixa el tronc sobre la tíbia davantera fins on toleris.
Mantingues respirant lent; canvia de costat.

seated_forward_fold_v1.name: Plegament endavant assegut
instructions: Asseu-te amb les dues cames esteses endavant i els peus flexionats.
Inclina't des dels malucs cap als peus sense arrodonir la lumbar.
Mantingues respirant; flexiona lleugerament els genolls si cal.

bridge_pose_yoga_v1.name: Postura del pont (Setu Bandha)
instructions: Estira't d'esquena amb genolls flexionats i peus a l'amplada del maluc.
Empeny pels peus i aixeca els malucs cap al sostre, opcionalment entrellaçant les mans sota.
Mantingues respirant i baixa controlat.

happy_baby_pose_v1.name: Bebè feliç
instructions: Estira't d'esquena i porta els genolls cap a les aixelles.
Agafa l'exterior dels peus i tira'ls suaument cap al terra amb les tíbies verticals.
Balanceja't lleugerament respirant lent.

sun_salutation_a_v1.name: Salutació al sol A
instructions: Des de dret, inspira braços amunt, espira plega endavant, inspira mig aixecat.
Espira recula a planxa, baixa al terra, inspira gos amunt, espira gos avall i respira.
Pas o salt al davant del matalàs, inspira mig aixecat, espira plega, inspira a dret; completa reps.

sun_salutation_b_v1.name: Salutació al sol B
instructions: Des de dret, inspira a postura de la cadira, espira plega, inspira mig aixecat, espira recula a planxa-chaturanga, inspira gos amunt, espira gos avall.
Inspira porta el peu dret a Guerrer I, espira torna a planxa-chaturanga i flueix per gos amunt i avall; repeteix amb l'esquerre.
Pas o salt al davant, inspira mig aixecat, espira plega, inspira a cadira, espira a dret; completa reps.

supine_twist_v1.name: Torsió supina
instructions: Estira't d'esquena, abraça un genoll al pit i guia'l a través del cos cap al costat oposat.
Estén el braç del mateix costat i mira cap al braç estès, mantenint les dues espatlles a terra.
Mantingues respirant lent; canvia de costat.

diaphragmatic_breathing_v1.name: Respiració diafragmàtica
instructions: Estira't d'esquena amb genolls flexionats i una mà al pit, l'altra a la panxa.
Inspira lent pel nas 4 segons expandint la panxa mentre el pit es manté quasi quiet.
Espira pels llavis arrunyats 6 segons; repeteix pel temps prescrit.

box_breathing_v1.name: Respiració quadrada 4-4-4-4
instructions: Asseu-te còmode amb la columna alta i les espatlles relaxades.
Inspira pel nas 4 segons, retén 4 segons.
Espira 4 segons, retén buit 4 segons; repeteix el cicle.

coherent_breathing_v1.name: Respiració coherent
instructions: Asseu-te o estira't còmode amb la columna neutra.
Inspira pel nas 5 segons expandint la panxa i les costelles.
Espira pel nas 5 segons; continua a aquest ritme 5–10 minuts.

alternate_nostril_breathing_v1.name: Respiració alterna (Nadi Shodhana)
instructions: Asseu-te còmode i porta la mà dreta a la cara amb el polze sobre la fossa dreta i l'anular sobre l'esquerra.
Tanca la fossa dreta i inspira per l'esquerra, llavors tanca l'esquerra i espira per la dreta.
Inspira per la dreta, tanca-la i espira per l'esquerra; continua alternant.

four_seven_eight_breathing_v1.name: Respiració 4-7-8
instructions: Asseu-te còmode i posa la punta de la llengua darrere les dents superiors.
Inspira en silenci pel nas 4 segons, retén l'aire 7 segons.
Espira audiblement per la boca 8 segons; repeteix 4 cicles.

savasana_v1.name: Savasana
instructions: Estira't d'esquena amb els braços lleugerament separats del cos, palmells amunt, i els peus relaxats oberts.
Tanca els ulls i deixa el cos enfonsar-se al matalàs alliberant tot esforç muscular.
Respira naturalment 5–15 minuts.

legs_up_wall_v1.name: Cames a la paret
instructions: Asseu-te de costat contra una paret i puja les cames per la paret mentre t'estires al matalàs.
Llisca els malucs a prop de la paret i deixa els braços relaxats als costats.
Respira lent 5–15 minuts.

supported_fish_pose_v1.name: Postura del peix amb suport
instructions: Posa un foam roller al llarg de la columna i estira't d'esquena perquè et sostingui la part alta longitudinalment.
Deixa els braços caure als costats i les cames esteses o flexionades.
Respira lent obrint el pit 2–5 minuts.

body_scan_v1.name: Escaneig corporal
instructions: Estira't còmode d'esquena amb braços als costats i ulls tancats.
Porta l'atenció lentament per cada part del cos des dels peus fins al cap, observant sense jutjar.
Respira naturalment 10–20 minuts.

progressive_muscle_relaxation_v1.name: Relaxació muscular progressiva
instructions: Estira't d'esquena i tensa els peus 5 segons, després allibera totalment 10 segons.
Puja pel cos tensant i alliberant bessons, cuixes, glutis, abdomen, mans, braços, espatlles i cara.
Acaba amb 1–2 minuts de respiració natural.

cat_cow_v1.name: Gato-vaca
instructions: Empieza a cuatro patas con muñecas bajo hombros y rodillas bajo caderas.
Inhala y arquea la columna bajando el abdomen mientras miras arriba (vaca).
Exhala y redondea la columna escondiendo barbilla y pelvis (gato); alterna lento.

world_greatest_stretch_v1.name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: Desde posición de flexión, avanza el pie derecho por fuera de la mano derecha en una zancada profunda.
Baja el codo derecho hacia el pie y luego rota el torso abriendo el brazo derecho hacia el techo.
Vuelve la mano al suelo y retrocede; alterna lados.

thoracic_bridge_v1.name: Puente torácico
instructions: Siéntate con rodillas flexionadas, pies en el suelo y manos detrás con dedos hacia atrás.
Eleva las caderas y rota a un lado extendiendo el brazo libre hacia arriba en extensión torácica.
Vuelve a la posición inicial controlado; alterna lados.

open_book_stretch_v1.name: Open book torácico
instructions: Túmbate de lado con rodillas apiladas a 90° y brazos extendidos delante, palmas juntas.
Inhala y abre lento el brazo de arriba siguiéndolo con la mirada, manteniendo las rodillas juntas.
Exhala para volver; haz reps y cambia de lado.

hip_90_90_switch_v1.name: Switch de cadera 90/90
instructions: Siéntate con una pierna delante con la tibia paralela al cuerpo y la otra al lado, ambas a 90°.
Eleva las rodillas y rota las caderas para cambiar las piernas a la posición opuesta.
Vuelve lento controlado sin ayudarte con las manos.

ankle_rocking_v1.name: Movilidad de tobillo
instructions: Arrodíllate sobre una rodilla con el pie delantero plano y manos sobre el muslo.
Empuja la rodilla delantera por encima de los dedos sintiendo estiramiento en el tobillo, con el talón en el suelo.
Vuelve y repite; cambia de lado.

wrist_warmup_circles_v1.name: Círculos de calentamiento de muñecas
instructions: Extiende los brazos delante y entrelaza los dedos.
Haz círculos lentos con las muñecas en sentido horario las reps prescritas.
Invierte la dirección las mismas reps.

neck_cars_v1.name: CARs de cuello
instructions: Siéntate o quédate de pie con los hombros relajados.
Rota lento la cabeza dibujando un círculo controlado explorando el rango sin dolor.
Invierte la dirección las mismas reps; mantén el movimiento lento.

shoulder_cars_v1.name: CARs de hombro
instructions: De pie con un brazo al lado, contrae el core.
Traza el círculo controlado más grande posible con el brazo: adelante, arriba, atrás y abajo.
Invierte la dirección; cambia de brazo.

hip_cars_v1.name: CARs de cadera
instructions: De pie sobre una pierna, agárrate a una pared para equilibrio si hace falta.
Eleva la rodilla libre a la altura de la cadera, ábrela al lado y luego llévala atrás y baja.
Invierte el círculo; cambia de lado.

foam_roll_thoracic_v1.name: Foam roller dorsal
instructions: Túmbate sobre un foam roller colocado en la parte alta de la espalda, rodillas flexionadas y manos detrás de la cabeza.
Eleva ligeramente las caderas y muévete arriba y abajo entre las escápulas y la zona media.
Pausa en puntos tensos y respira lento; evita la zona lumbar.

foam_roll_quads_v1.name: Foam roller cuádriceps
instructions: Túmbate boca abajo con el foam roller en la parte frontal de los muslos, apoyado sobre los antebrazos.
Muévete lento desde justo encima de las rodillas hasta los flexores de cadera.
Pausa en puntos tensos y respira; evita rodar sobre la rótula.

foam_roll_glutes_v1.name: Foam roller glúteos
instructions: Siéntate sobre un foam roller con un tobillo cruzado sobre la rodilla opuesta.
Inclínate hacia el lado de la pierna cruzada y muévete lento sobre el glúteo.
Pausa en puntos tensos y respira; cambia de lado.

pec_release_ball_v1.name: Liberación pectoral con pelota
instructions: Coloca una pelota de masaje entre la parte alta del pecho y una pared, justo bajo la clavícula.
Aplica presión contra la pelota y mueve el brazo para encontrar puntos tensos.
Mantén 20–30 segundos cada punto respirando lento; cambia de lado.

couch_stretch_v1.name: Couch stretch
instructions: Arrodíllate de espaldas a la pared o sofá, coloca una tibia contra la pared con el pie hacia arriba y el otro pie plano delante en zancada.
Contrae el glúteo trasero y eleva el pecho alto manteniendo la lumbar neutra.
Mantén 30–60 segundos respirando lento; cambia de lado.

downward_dog_v1.name: Perro boca abajo
instructions: Desde cuatro patas, flexiona los dedos de los pies y eleva las caderas arriba y atrás formando una V invertida.
Empuja el pecho hacia los muslos y los talones hacia el suelo sin bloquear rodillas.
Mantén respirando con constancia el tiempo prescrito.

upward_dog_v1.name: Perro boca arriba
instructions: Túmbate boca abajo con manos bajo hombros y empeines en la esterilla.
Empuja las manos elevando pecho, caderas y muslos del suelo con brazos extendidos.
Rueda los hombros atrás y mira ligeramente arriba; mantén respirando.

cobra_pose_v1.name: Postura de la cobra
instructions: Túmbate boca abajo con manos bajo hombros y codos pegados.
Empuja ligeramente elevando el pecho del suelo con los codos aún flexionados.
Mantén respirando; baja controlado.

childs_pose_v1.name: Postura del niño
instructions: Arrodíllate en la esterilla con los dedos gordos juntos y las rodillas abiertas.
Sienta las caderas en los talones y camina las manos delante extendiendo los brazos.
Apoya la frente en la esterilla y respira lento hacia la espalda.

warrior_one_v1.name: Guerrero I
instructions: Avanza un pie en una zancada larga con el pie trasero girado 45°.
Flexiona la rodilla delantera sobre el tobillo y extiende ambos brazos arriba, palmas enfrentadas.
Cuadra las caderas adelante y mantén respirando; cambia de lado.

warrior_two_v1.name: Guerrero II
instructions: Abre los pies, gira el pie delantero adelante y el trasero 90° al lado.
Flexiona la rodilla delantera sobre el tobillo y extiende los brazos paralelos al suelo.
Mira sobre la mano delantera y mantén respirando; cambia de lado.

triangle_pose_v1.name: Postura del triángulo
instructions: Abre los pies, gira el pie delantero adelante y el trasero 90°, brazos extendidos a los lados.
Flexiona por la cadera delantera llevando la mano delantera hacia el tobillo y la mano de arriba al techo.
Mantén el pecho abierto y mira arriba; cambia de lado.

tree_pose_v1.name: Postura del árbol
instructions: De pie y transfiere el peso a una pierna.
Coloca el otro pie en el tobillo, gemelo o muslo interno (evita la rodilla) y lleva las manos al pecho o arriba.
Mantén respirando; cambia de lado.

pigeon_pose_v1.name: Postura de la paloma
instructions: Desde cuatro patas, lleva una tibia adelante cruzando la esterilla con la pierna trasera estirada.
Cuadra las caderas y baja el torso sobre la tibia delantera hasta donde toleres.
Mantén respirando lento; cambia de lado.

seated_forward_fold_v1.name: Flexión sentada hacia delante
instructions: Siéntate con ambas piernas extendidas delante y los pies flexionados.
Inclínate desde las caderas hacia los pies sin redondear la lumbar.
Mantén respirando; flexiona ligeramente las rodillas si hace falta.

bridge_pose_yoga_v1.name: Postura del puente (Setu Bandha)
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas con rodillas flexionadas y pies al ancho de cadera.
Empuja por los pies y eleva las caderas hacia el techo, opcionalmente entrelazando las manos debajo.
Mantén respirando y baja controlado.

happy_baby_pose_v1.name: Bebé feliz
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas y lleva las rodillas hacia las axilas.
Agarra el exterior de los pies y tira de ellos suavemente hacia el suelo con las tibias verticales.
Balancéate ligeramente respirando lento.

sun_salutation_a_v1.name: Saludo al sol A
instructions: Desde de pie, inhala brazos arriba, exhala flexión adelante, inhala medio elevado.
Exhala retrocede a plancha, baja al suelo, inhala perro arriba, exhala perro abajo y respira.
Paso o salto al frente, inhala medio elevado, exhala flexión, inhala a de pie; completa reps.

sun_salutation_b_v1.name: Saludo al sol B
instructions: Desde de pie, inhala a postura de la silla, exhala flexión, inhala medio elevado, exhala retrocede a plancha-chaturanga, inhala perro arriba, exhala perro abajo.
Inhala lleva el pie derecho a Guerrero I, exhala vuelve a plancha-chaturanga y fluye por perro arriba y abajo; repite con el izquierdo.
Paso o salto al frente, inhala medio elevado, exhala flexión, inhala a silla, exhala a de pie; completa reps.

supine_twist_v1.name: Torsión supina
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas, abraza una rodilla al pecho y guíala a través del cuerpo al lado opuesto.
Extiende el brazo del mismo lado y mira hacia el brazo extendido, manteniendo ambos hombros en el suelo.
Mantén respirando lento; cambia de lado.

diaphragmatic_breathing_v1.name: Respiración diafragmática
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas con rodillas flexionadas y una mano en el pecho, la otra en el abdomen.
Inhala lento por la nariz 4 segundos expandiendo el abdomen mientras el pecho se mantiene casi quieto.
Exhala por los labios fruncidos 6 segundos; repite el tiempo prescrito.

box_breathing_v1.name: Respiración cuadrada 4-4-4-4
instructions: Siéntate cómodo con la columna alta y los hombros relajados.
Inhala por la nariz 4 segundos, retén 4 segundos.
Exhala 4 segundos, retén vacío 4 segundos; repite el ciclo.

coherent_breathing_v1.name: Respiración coherente
instructions: Siéntate o túmbate cómodo con la columna neutra.
Inhala por la nariz 5 segundos expandiendo abdomen y costillas.
Exhala por la nariz 5 segundos; continúa a este ritmo 5–10 minutos.

alternate_nostril_breathing_v1.name: Respiración alterna (Nadi Shodhana)
instructions: Siéntate cómodo y lleva la mano derecha a la cara con el pulgar sobre la fosa derecha y el anular sobre la izquierda.
Cierra la fosa derecha e inhala por la izquierda, luego cierra la izquierda y exhala por la derecha.
Inhala por la derecha, ciérrala y exhala por la izquierda; continúa alternando.

four_seven_eight_breathing_v1.name: Respiración 4-7-8
instructions: Siéntate cómodo y coloca la punta de la lengua detrás de los dientes superiores.
Inhala en silencio por la nariz 4 segundos, retén la respiración 7 segundos.
Exhala audiblemente por la boca 8 segundos; repite 4 ciclos.

savasana_v1.name: Savasana
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas con los brazos ligeramente separados del cuerpo, palmas arriba, y los pies relajados abiertos.
Cierra los ojos y deja que el cuerpo se hunda en la esterilla liberando todo esfuerzo muscular.
Respira naturalmente 5–15 minutos.

legs_up_wall_v1.name: Piernas en la pared
instructions: Siéntate de lado contra una pared y sube las piernas por la pared mientras te tumbas en la esterilla.
Desliza las caderas cerca de la pared y deja los brazos relajados a los lados.
Respira lento 5–15 minutos.

supported_fish_pose_v1.name: Postura del pez con apoyo
instructions: Coloca un foam roller a lo largo de la columna y túmbate de espaldas para que sostenga la parte alta longitudinalmente.
Deja caer los brazos a los lados y las piernas extendidas o flexionadas.
Respira lento abriendo el pecho 2–5 minutos.

body_scan_v1.name: Escaneo corporal
instructions: Túmbate cómodo de espaldas con brazos a los lados y ojos cerrados.
Lleva la atención lento por cada parte del cuerpo desde los pies hasta la cabeza, observando sin juzgar.
Respira naturalmente 10–20 minutos.

progressive_muscle_relaxation_v1.name: Relajación muscular progresiva
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas y tensa los pies 5 segundos, luego suelta totalmente 10 segundos.
Sube por el cuerpo tensando y soltando gemelos, muslos, glúteos, abdomen, manos, brazos, hombros y cara.
Termina con 1–2 minutos de respiración natural.

cat_cow_v1.name: Cat-Cow
instructions: Start on hands and knees with wrists under shoulders and knees under hips.
Inhale and arch the spine dropping the belly while looking up (cow).
Exhale and round the spine tucking the chin and pelvis (cat); alternate slowly.

world_greatest_stretch_v1.name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: From a push-up position step the right foot outside the right hand into a deep lunge.
Drop the right elbow toward the instep, then rotate the torso opening the right arm up to the ceiling.
Return the hand to the floor and step back; alternate sides.

thoracic_bridge_v1.name: Thoracic Bridge
instructions: Sit with knees bent, feet flat and hands behind you, fingers pointing back.
Lift the hips and rotate to one side reaching the free hand overhead in a thoracic extension.
Return to the start under control; alternate sides.

open_book_stretch_v1.name: Open Book Thoracic Rotation
instructions: Lie on one side with knees stacked at 90° and arms extended in front, palms together.
Inhale and slowly open the top arm across the body following it with your gaze, keeping the knees stacked.
Exhale to return; complete reps and switch sides.

hip_90_90_switch_v1.name: 90/90 Hip Switch
instructions: Sit with one shin in front parallel to the body and the other shin to the side, both at 90°.
Lift the knees and rotate the hips to switch leg positions to the opposite side.
Return slowly under control without using the hands.

ankle_rocking_v1.name: Ankle Rocking
instructions: Kneel on one knee with the front foot flat and hands on the front thigh.
Drive the front knee forward over the toes feeling a stretch in the ankle, keeping the heel down.
Return and repeat for reps; switch sides.

wrist_warmup_circles_v1.name: Wrist Warm-up Circles
instructions: Extend the arms in front and interlock the fingers.
Circle the wrists slowly clockwise for the prescribed reps.
Reverse direction for the same number of reps.

neck_cars_v1.name: Neck CARs
instructions: Sit or stand tall with shoulders relaxed.
Slowly rotate the head in a controlled circle exploring the full range without pain.
Reverse direction for the same reps; keep the motion slow.

shoulder_cars_v1.name: Shoulder CARs
instructions: Stand tall with one arm at the side, brace the core.
Trace the largest controlled circle possible with the arm: forward, up, back and down.
Reverse direction; switch arms.

hip_cars_v1.name: Hip CARs
instructions: Stand on one leg, holding a wall for balance if needed.
Lift the free knee to hip height, abduct it to the side, then rotate it back behind you and lower.
Reverse the circle; switch sides.

foam_roll_thoracic_v1.name: Foam Roll Thoracic Spine
instructions: Lie back on a foam roller placed across the upper back, knees bent and hands behind the head.
Lift the hips slightly and roll up and down between the shoulder blades and mid-back.
Pause on tight spots and breathe slowly; avoid the lumbar spine.

foam_roll_quads_v1.name: Foam Roll Quads
instructions: Lie face-down with the foam roller across the front of the thighs, supporting the upper body on the forearms.
Roll slowly from above the knees to the hip flexors.
Pause on tight spots and breathe; avoid rolling directly on the kneecap.

foam_roll_glutes_v1.name: Foam Roll Glutes
instructions: Sit on a foam roller with one ankle crossed over the opposite knee.
Lean toward the crossed-leg side and roll slowly across the glute.
Pause on tight spots and breathe; switch sides.

pec_release_ball_v1.name: Pec Release with Massage Ball
instructions: Place a massage ball between the upper chest and a wall just below the collarbone.
Lean into the ball and slowly explore the area moving the arm to find tight spots.
Hold each tight spot for 20–30 seconds breathing slowly; switch sides.

couch_stretch_v1.name: Couch Stretch
instructions: Kneel facing away from a wall or couch, place one shin against the wall with the foot pointing up and the other foot flat in front in a lunge.
Squeeze the back glute and lift the chest tall, keeping the lower back neutral.
Hold for 30–60 seconds breathing slowly; switch sides.

downward_dog_v1.name: Downward-Facing Dog
instructions: From hands and knees, tuck the toes and lift the hips up and back into an inverted V shape.
Press the chest toward the thighs and the heels toward the floor without locking the knees.
Hold breathing steadily for the prescribed time.

upward_dog_v1.name: Upward-Facing Dog
instructions: Lie face-down with hands under the shoulders and tops of the feet on the mat.
Press into the hands lifting the chest, hips and thighs off the floor with arms straight.
Roll the shoulders back and look slightly up; hold breathing steadily.

cobra_pose_v1.name: Cobra Pose
instructions: Lie face-down with hands under the shoulders and elbows tucked.
Press lightly into the hands lifting the chest off the floor with the elbows still bent.
Hold breathing steadily; lower under control.

childs_pose_v1.name: Child's Pose
instructions: Kneel on the mat with big toes touching and knees apart.
Sit the hips back to the heels and walk the hands forward extending the arms.
Rest the forehead on the mat and breathe slowly into the back.

warrior_one_v1.name: Warrior I
instructions: Step one foot forward into a long lunge with the back foot turned out 45°.
Bend the front knee over the ankle and reach both arms overhead, palms facing.
Square the hips forward and hold breathing steadily; switch sides.

warrior_two_v1.name: Warrior II
instructions: Step the feet wide apart, turn the front foot forward and the back foot 90° to the side.
Bend the front knee over the ankle and extend the arms parallel to the floor.
Gaze over the front hand and hold breathing steadily; switch sides.

triangle_pose_v1.name: Triangle Pose
instructions: Step the feet wide, turn the front foot forward and back foot 90°, arms extended sideways.
Hinge from the front hip reaching the front hand toward the ankle and the top hand to the ceiling.
Keep the chest open and gaze up; switch sides.

tree_pose_v1.name: Tree Pose
instructions: Stand tall and shift weight onto one foot.
Place the other foot on the inner ankle, calf or thigh (avoid the knee) and bring the hands to the chest or overhead.
Hold breathing steadily; switch sides.

pigeon_pose_v1.name: Pigeon Pose
instructions: From hands and knees, bring one shin forward across the mat with the back leg extended straight back.
Square the hips and lower the torso over the front shin to your comfortable depth.
Hold breathing slowly; switch sides.

seated_forward_fold_v1.name: Seated Forward Fold
instructions: Sit with both legs extended forward and feet flexed.
Hinge from the hips reaching toward the feet without rounding the lower back.
Hold breathing steadily; bend the knees slightly if needed.

bridge_pose_yoga_v1.name: Bridge Pose (Setu Bandha)
instructions: Lie on the back with knees bent and feet hip-width apart.
Press into the feet and lift the hips toward the ceiling, optionally clasping the hands beneath the body.
Hold breathing steadily and lower under control.

happy_baby_pose_v1.name: Happy Baby
instructions: Lie on the back and bring the knees toward the armpits.
Grab the outsides of the feet and gently pull them down toward the floor with shins vertical.
Rock slightly side to side breathing slowly.

sun_salutation_a_v1.name: Sun Salutation A
instructions: From standing inhale arms overhead, exhale fold forward, inhale halfway lift.
Exhale step or jump back to plank, lower to the floor, inhale to upward dog, exhale to downward dog and breathe.
Step or jump to the front of the mat, inhale halfway lift, exhale fold, inhale to stand; complete reps.

sun_salutation_b_v1.name: Sun Salutation B
instructions: From standing inhale into chair pose, exhale fold forward, inhale halfway lift, exhale step back to plank then chaturanga, inhale upward dog, exhale downward dog.
Inhale step the right foot forward into Warrior I, exhale return to plank/chaturanga and flow through up dog and down dog; repeat with left.
Step or jump to the front, inhale halfway lift, exhale fold, inhale to chair, exhale stand; complete reps.

supine_twist_v1.name: Supine Spinal Twist
instructions: Lie on the back, hug one knee to the chest then guide it across the body to the opposite side.
Extend the same-side arm out and turn the gaze toward the extended arm, keeping both shoulders on the floor.
Hold breathing slowly; switch sides.

diaphragmatic_breathing_v1.name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
instructions: Lie on the back with knees bent and one hand on the chest, the other on the belly.
Inhale slowly through the nose for 4 seconds expanding the belly while the chest stays relatively still.
Exhale through pursed lips for 6 seconds; repeat for the prescribed time.

box_breathing_v1.name: Box Breathing 4-4-4-4
instructions: Sit comfortably with the spine tall and shoulders relaxed.
Inhale through the nose for 4 seconds, hold for 4 seconds.
Exhale for 4 seconds, hold empty for 4 seconds; repeat the cycle.

coherent_breathing_v1.name: Coherent Breathing
instructions: Sit or lie comfortably with the spine in neutral.
Inhale through the nose for 5 seconds expanding the belly and ribs.
Exhale through the nose for 5 seconds; continue at this pace for 5–10 minutes.

alternate_nostril_breathing_v1.name: Alternate Nostril Breathing (Nadi Shodhana)
instructions: Sit comfortably and bring the right hand to the face with thumb on the right nostril and ring finger on the left.
Close the right nostril and inhale through the left, then close the left and exhale through the right.
Inhale through the right, close it and exhale through the left; continue alternating.

four_seven_eight_breathing_v1.name: 4-7-8 Breathing
instructions: Sit comfortably and place the tongue tip behind the upper teeth.
Inhale silently through the nose for 4 seconds, hold the breath for 7 seconds.
Exhale audibly through the mouth for 8 seconds; repeat for 4 cycles.

savasana_v1.name: Savasana
instructions: Lie on the back with arms slightly away from the body, palms up, and feet relaxed apart.
Close the eyes and let the body sink into the mat releasing all muscular effort.
Breathe naturally for 5–15 minutes.

legs_up_wall_v1.name: Legs-Up-the-Wall
instructions: Sit sideways against a wall and swing the legs up the wall as you lie back on the mat.
Slide the hips close to the wall and let the arms relax at the sides.
Breathe slowly for 5–15 minutes.

supported_fish_pose_v1.name: Supported Fish Pose
instructions: Place a foam roller along the spine and lie back so it supports the upper back lengthwise.
Let the arms fall open to the sides and the legs extend or bend at the knees.
Breathe slowly opening the chest for 2–5 minutes.

body_scan_v1.name: Body Scan Relaxation
instructions: Lie comfortably on the back with arms by the sides and eyes closed.
Bring attention slowly through each body part from feet to head, noticing sensations without judgement.
Breathe naturally for 10–20 minutes.

progressive_muscle_relaxation_v1.name: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
instructions: Lie on the back and tense the feet for 5 seconds, then fully release for 10 seconds.
Move up the body tensing and releasing calves, thighs, glutes, abdomen, hands, arms, shoulders and face.
Finish with 1–2 minutes of natural breathing.
